title: EndpointType naming/API polish: Otherâ†’Unknown, as_uriâ†’as_str, add Display
description: Three small polish items deferred from the enum-wiring epic review: (1) rename EndpointType::Other(String) to Unknown(String) to match BodyType/PushUrgency pattern; (2) rename EndpointType::as_uri() to as_str() for consistency with BodyType; (3) add impl Display for EndpointType delegating to as_str(). These are pure API consistency improvements with no correctness or behavior change.
